Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We have activities RO CA RI PI QC PO GSL D IC RP

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: When a new customer order arrives it must be processed through a series of activities

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We must think of plausible constraints

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Generate Shipping Label GSL and Dispatch D are equivalent Actually dispatch only after shipping label but they might both occur exactly once each case So equivalence could be between GSL and D

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Invoice Customer and Record Payment also appear together exactly once per case when payment done so add pair between IC and RP as well

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Always Before eg CA before RI RI before PI PI before QC QC before PO PO before GSL GSL before D D before IC RP should occur after IC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Directly Follows Constraints eg RO CA CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D D IC IC RP

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Never Together not sure In our simplified scenario there are no mutually exclusive branches described thus never together empty set

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Activity Occurrences each activity likely occurs 0 or 1 times

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The problem did not ask us to provide reasoning about which constraints apply beyond constructing dictionary representing skeleton for scenario so a simple linear chain is fine
